name: GPT-2 영문 동화 생성
story_en:
A children's story.

Once upon a time, there was a children ' s drawing of a tiger and a girl flying in the sky. The main character was children, kite flying outside. The mood was happy.

The story begins:
 "One morning my mother woke me up with her voice so loud that it frightened every child out on the road; she said we had to go for something." My father would always be worried about his son coming home from school early because he didn't want him scared at night by someone who heard their footsteps walking down one street after another - you know those things? It took all our effort not even making noise but hiding how terrified I was inside until finally they agreed...that afternoon when lunchtime came through suddenly (and never more than once before), Dad went over into the kitchen just as Mother turned around towards us! She looked like any other normal housewife-like woman except this day everything became quiet!! Suddenly without warning Father grabbed hold & held onto them tightly while Mom started crying loudly....a huge wave crashed against each door which then fell silent again..then nothing happened….until mom stopped sobbing......her hands were shaking uncontrollably.....she thought maybe God did tell her what He wanted!!!
